description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a distinctive angular roof design and a combination of flat and sloped roof sections. The exterior features a mix of light gray and dark gray wall panels, with large windows providing ample natural light. The front facade includes a double garage, a prominent balcony above the entryway, and a paved driveway. The windows are arranged in vertical strips and large panes, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The house has clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a functional layout typical of modern suburban homes. The entryway is slightly recessed, sheltered by the overhanging roof, and accented with a wooden panel near the door.
description: A modern two-story house with angular blue-gray roofs, large windows, a double garage, and a prominent balcony above the main entryway. The exterior is finished in light and dark gray panels with clean, contemporary lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entryway with balcony above, and a paved driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended roof, minimal window placement, and the large window section at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the stepped roofline, large rear windows, and the overall massing of the house.
description_view_3: Back view showing the flat rear facade, large window, and the continuation of the driveway surface.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a balcony above, sheltered by an overhanging roof, and accented with a wooden panel and paved steps.
